title: Red Hat Security Advisory: luksmeta security update
overview:
An update for luksmeta is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: luksmeta security update

An update for luksmeta is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for luksmeta is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.src.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
libluksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
libluksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm

libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
luksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
luksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm

luksmeta-debugsource-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
libluksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
luksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
luksmeta-debugsource-9-4.el8_10.1.s390x.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
libluksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
luksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
luksmeta-debugsource-9-4.el8_10.1.ppc64le.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
libluksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
luksmeta-debuginfo-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
luksmeta-debugsource-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-11568: A data corruption vulnerability has been identified in the luksmeta utility when used with the LUKS1 disk encryption format. An attacker with the necessary permissions can exploit this flaw by writing a large amount of metadata to an encrypted device. The utility fails to correctly validate the available space, causing the metadata to overwrite and corrupt the user's encrypted data. This action leads to a permanent loss of the stored information. Devices using the LUKS formats other than LUKS1 are not affected by this issue.
